The '''laser carbine''' was a medium-sized [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] weapon capable of dealing out more damage than most [[laser pistol]]s.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This weapon features the grip, trigger and receiver of the WW2-era M3A1 Grease Gun, and the barrel, gas tube and front sights (albeit upside down) of the AK-47.

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
